rtoffsets.name: ACK
rtoffsets.remarks: Acknowledge byte ASCII 0x06, other values signal an error)

rtoffsets.name: Seconds
rtoffsets.remarks: Number of seconds since engine startup

rtoffsets.name: Spark Advance Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Spark advance for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Spark Advance Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Spark advance for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Raw Table Fuel, Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map raw value for the front cylinder interpolated, unscaled)

rtoffsets.name: Table Fuel, Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map value for the front cylinder interpolated, scaled to fuel map range)

rtoffsets.name: Raw Table Fuel, Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map raw value for the rear cylinder interpolated, unscaled)

rtoffsets.name: Table Fuel, Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map value for the rear cylinder interpolated, scaled to fuel map range)

rtoffsets.name: Fuel Pulsewidth Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector pulsewidth for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Fuel Pulsewidth Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector pulsewidth for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Load Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Load for the rear cylinder 8-bit resolution)

rtoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 sensor unscaled input for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: O2 Voltage Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust O2 sensor voltage for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: AFV Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Adaptive fuel value for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: EGO Correction
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 fuel adjustment for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Rides
rtoffsets.remarks: Number of rides since trouble code set

rtoffsets.name: Coil Feedback Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Front ignition coil unscaled feedback signal

rtoffsets.name: Coil Feedback Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Rear ignition coil unscaled feedback signal

rtoffsets.name: Injector Feedback Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector unscaled feedback signal for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Injector Feedback Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector unscaled feedback signal for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: TPS 10Bit
rtoffsets.remarks: Throttle position sensor unscaled input 10-bit resolution)

rtoffsets.name: Engine Temperature Sensor
rtoffsets.remarks: Engine temperature sensor for the rear cylinder unscaled signal

rtoffsets.name: ETS Voltage
rtoffsets.remarks: Engine temperature sensor for the rear cylinder voltage

rtoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor
rtoffsets.remarks: Manifold air temperature sensor unscaled input

bits.bit7: TPS too high/short to supply voltage
bits.bit2: Engine Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit8: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 0

bits.bit8: Air Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit1: Coil 1 short to ground or open
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 1

bits.bit2: Tachometer output short to supply voltage
bits.bit4: Fuel pump short to supply voltage
bits.name: Stored Errors Byte 2
Stored Errors Byte 3
bits.bit6: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

bits.bit2: Tachometer output short to supply voltage
bits.bit4: Fuel pump short to supply voltage

Current Errors Byte 3
bits.bit6: Fan 1 (rear or right) short to supply voltage

rtoffsets.name: ACK
rtoffsets.remarks: Acknowledge byte ASCII 0x06, other values signal an error)

rtoffsets.name: Seconds
rtoffsets.remarks: Number of seconds since engine startup

rtoffsets.name: Spark Advance Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Spark advance for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Spark Advance Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Spark advance for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Raw Table Fuel, Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map raw value for the front cylinder interpolated, unscaled)

rtoffsets.name: Table Fuel, Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map value for the front cylinder interpolated, scaled to fuel map range)

rtoffsets.name: Raw Table Fuel, Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map raw value for the rear cylinder interpolated, unscaled)

rtoffsets.name: Table Fuel, Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map value for the rear cylinder interpolated, scaled to fuel map range)

rtoffsets.remarks: Injector pulsewidth for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Fuel Pulsewidth Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector pulsewidth for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Load Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Load for the rear cylinder 8-bit resolution)

rtoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 sensor unscaled input for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust O2 sensor voltage for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: AFV Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Adaptive fuel value for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: EGO Correction
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 fuel adjustment for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Rides
rtoffsets.remarks: Number of rides since trouble code set

rtoffsets.remarks: Front ignition coil unscaled feedback signal

rtoffsets.name: Coil Feedback Rear

rtoffsets.name: ACK
rtoffsets.remarks: Acknowledge byte ASCII 0x06, other values signal an error)

rtoffsets.name: Load Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Load for the front cylinder 8-bit resolution)

rtoffsets.name: Seconds
rtoffsets.remarks: Number of seconds since engine startup

rtoffsets.name: Spark Advance Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Spark advance for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Spark Advance Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Spark advance for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Raw Table Fuel, Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map raw value for the front cylinder interpolated, unscaled)

rtoffsets.name: Table Fuel, Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map value for the front cylinder interpolated, scaled to fuel map range)

rtoffsets.name: Raw Table Fuel, Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map raw value for the rear cylinder interpolated, unscaled)

rtoffsets.name: Table Fuel, Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Fuel map value for the rear cylinder interpolated, scaled to fuel map range)

rtoffsets.name: Fuel Pulsewidth Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector pulsewidth for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Fuel Pulsewidth Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector pulsewidth for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Load Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Load for the rear cylinder 8-bit resolution)

rtoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 sensor unscaled input for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: O2 Voltage Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust O2 sensor voltage for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: MAP Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Manifold air pressure sensor unscaled input for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: MAP Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Manifold air pressure sensor unscaled input for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: AFV Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Adaptive fuel value for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: EGO Correction
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 fuel adjustment for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Throttle and IAC Load
rtoffsets.remarks: Throttle and intake air controller load

rtoffsets.name: Air-Fuel Sensor Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Air-fuel ratio sensor for the front cylinder unscaled input

rtoffsets.name: Air-Fuel Sensor Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Air-fuel ratio sensor for the rear cylinder unsacaled input

rtoffsets.name: Rides
rtoffsets.remarks: Number of rides since trouble code set

rtoffsets.name: Coil Feedback Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Front ignition coil unscaled feedback signal

rtoffsets.name: Coil Feedback Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Rear ignition coil unscaled feedback signal

rtoffsets.name: Injector Feedback Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector unscaled feedback signal for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Injector Feedback Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Injector unscaled feedback signal for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: TPS 10Bit
rtoffsets.remarks: Throttle position sensor unscaled input 10-bit resolution)

rtoffsets.name: Engine Temperature Sensor
rtoffsets.remarks: Engine temperature sensor for the rear cylinder unscaled signal

rtoffsets.name: ETS Voltage
rtoffsets.remarks: Engine temperature sensor for the rear cylinder voltage

rtoffsets.name: Air Temperature Sensor
rtoffsets.remarks: Manifold air temperature sensor unscaled input

rtoffsets.name: AFR Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Dyno AFR input for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: Catalyst O2 Sensor
rtoffsets.remarks: Catalytic convertor monitoring O2 sensor unscaled input

rtoffsets.name: Engine Temp Sensor
rtoffsets.remarks: Engine temperature sensor for the front cylinder unscaled signal

rtoffsets.name: AFR Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Dyno AFR input for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: O2 Voltage Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust O2 sensor voltage for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: O2 Sensor Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 sensor unscaled input for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: MAP Sensor
rtoffsets.remarks: Manifold air pressure sensor unscaled input

rtoffsets.name: MAP Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Manifold air pressure for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: MAP Rear
rtoffsets.remarks: Mainfold air pressure for the rear cylinder

rtoffsets.name: AFV Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Adaptive fuel value for the front cylinder

rtoffsets.name: EGO Correction Front
rtoffsets.remarks: Exhaust gas O2 fuel adjustment for the front cylinder

bits.bit2: Engine Temperature too high/short to ground
bits.bit8: Cooling fan 1 (rear or right) short to ground
